title: FishTimer
description: Keep tabs on your fishing times!
body:
## About
Fishing is an interesting aspect of Minecraft that often captivates players with its simplicity and surprising depth. The subtle bobbing of the fishing rod or the sound of gentle rain pattering around you provides a safe haven to unwind and relax in. When immersed in this soothing atmosphere, many players find themselves losing track of time while engrossed in this calming activity (maybe not but idk what to put -.-).

"FishTimer" intends to keep you aware of this time through a dynamic **timer which updates in real time** and actively shows the seconds being spent angling. Of course, you can always toggle the timer off should you ever feel the need. Use the commands below to control the datapack. All are **usable in survival** for extra convenience.

And who knows what mysteries may emerge from the watery depths? After all, patience is the reel that brings in the best fish...

**THIS PROJECT IS EXCLUSIVELY FOR SINGLEPLAYER USE UNTIL FURTHER UPDTES**

## Commands
**A)** Toggle the mod: **`/trigger fishtimer_toggle`**\
**B)** View the current On/Off state: **`/trigger fishtimer_status`**


---

*Made with [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/)*
